ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
A Command Line application and Python library to conjugate verbs in French, English, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese and Romanian using Machine Learning techniques.

mlconjug3 can conjugate known and unseen verbs using pre-trained machine learning models.

FEATURES:
- Command Line Interface tool
- Easy API for Python integration
- Machine learning based verb conjugation
- Multi-language support (6 languages)
- Extensible model training pipeline
- High accuracy conjugation prediction

Documentation: https://mlconjug3.readthedocs.io

Supported languages:
- French
- English
- Spanish
- Italian
- Portuguese
- Romanian

Free software: MIT license
about.summary: A Python library to conjugate French, English, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese and Romanian verbs using Machine Learning techniques.

about.description:
A Command Line application and Python library to conjugate verbs in French, English, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese and Romanian using Machine Learning techniques.

mlconjug3 can conjugate known and unseen verbs using pre-trained machine learning models.

FEATURES:
- Command Line Interface tool
- Easy API for Python integration

- Extensible model training pipeline

about.summary: A Python library to conjugate French, English, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese and Romanian verbs using Machine Learning techniques.

name: mlconjug3
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "mlconjug3" %}
{% set version = "4.0.1" %}
{% set python_min = "3.9" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/mlconjug3-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: e589f9db9e02ff61b586025937c8ec6ec8df6df49177bc20392287e03a78be13

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: python
  entry_points:
    - mlconjug3=mlconjug3.cli:main
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - setuptools
    - wheel
    - poetry-core

  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }},<4.0

    # core CLI / utils
    - click >=8.1,<9
    - defusedxml
    - joblib >=1.2,<2
    - numpy >=1.26,<2

    # ML backend
    - scikit-learn >=1.3

    # utilities
    - rich >=13,<14
    - pyyaml >=6,<7
    - tomlkit >=0.11,<1

test:
  imports:
    - mlconjug3

  commands:
    - pip check
    - mlconjug3 --help

  requires:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip

about:
  home: https://github.com/SekouDiaoNlp/mlconjug3
  summary: A Python library to conjugate French, English, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese and Romanian verbs using Machine Learning techniques.
  license: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE

  description: |
    A Command Line application and Python library to conjugate verbs in French, English, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese and Romanian using Machine Learning techniques.

    mlconjug3 can conjugate known and unseen verbs using pre-trained machine learning models.

    FEATURES:
    - Command Line Interface tool
    - Easy API for Python integration
    - Machine learning based verb conjugation
    - Multi-language support (6 languages)
    - Extensible model training pipeline
    - High accuracy conjugation prediction

    Documentation: https://mlconjug3.readthedocs.io

    Supported languages:
    - French
    - English
    - Spanish
    - Italian
    - Portuguese
    - Romanian

    Free software: MIT license

  doc_url: https://mlconjug3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/
  dev_url: https://github.com/SekouDiaoNlp/mlconjug3

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - SekouDiaoNlp
